name: Drowning in Crimson
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The wielder's Base DMG +[StateArg1]%. Before Exalt, Temporary hand size +1, draw 1 Command Card. In {Caro} realm, triggering {Devour} temporarily increases Crit. DMG by [StateArg1]%, once per turn
lore:
She once questioned countless times in the dead of night: Why must she endure this endless pain?
No one answered.
Her hoarse whispers turned into fragments, never reaching the ears of any god.
Her pain festered, turning into pus and brewing deeper hatred.
One day, she noticed black liquid oozing from the people around her, resembling her own blood.
They quickly descended into madness, just like her.
Perhaps it was their pain; she watched coldly, feeling a faint sense of satisfaction.
But if that was pain, hadn't she long been consumed by the darkness?
She approached the lingering blackness and unexpectedly found freedom.
Yet the freedom brought no relief; she was like a demon exiled to Hell for millennia, her desires corroded by hatred.
Her body bound in shackles, her soul weighed down by lead.
Only the eerie screams could cleanse her heavy soul, allowing her to breathe freely.
Come, taste what I have tasted, and become me.
She found red to be a marvelous color.
She finally understood: Pain has no reason.
Either drink it yourself or invite others to share.
Tonight, she poured the bitter wine, inviting the entire town.
